message:
feat(dashboard): complete terminal SSH proxy integration

Implement full WebSocket-to-SSH terminal proxy in TerminalHandler:
- Extract task ID from URL path (/ws/terminal/{taskID})
- Create SSH connections using SSH agent authentication
- Request PTY and start shell on connection
- Handle bidirectional I/O between WebSocket and SSH
- Support terminal_input, terminal_resize, and terminal_output messages
- Graceful error handling with user-visible error messages
- Session cleanup on disconnect

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
